standard_variable.semantic_intent: exact renal replacement therapy modality episode
standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per retained labeled episode interval

database_mapping.source_status_field: dialysis_type + crrt.mode + procedureevents.itemid normalized to exact modality
database_mapping.source_start_field: charttime or procedure starttime after approved intervalization
database_mapping.source_end_field: charttime plus modality-specific carry window or procedure endtime after approved intervalization
database_mapping.source_grain: one exact-modality source point or dialysis procedure interval row before exact-modality episode union
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained positive exact-modality episode row

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patient-level identifier from trusted stay map
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: hospital-admission-level identifier from trusted stay map
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: ICU-stay-level identifier from official RRT/CRRT sources, ICU procedureevents, and trusted stay map

included_scope: CRRT mode context points with exact modality labels
exact labels CRRT, CVVH, CVVHD, CVVHDF, SCUF, IHD, and Peritoneal
mapping_specific_notes: Unresolved any-RRT active dialysis evidence is intentionally not forced into an exact-modality child row.
Child rows link to the largest positive-overlap any-RRT parent episode and, when opening-family eligible, to the largest positive-overlap family parent episode.
adjacent_status_boundary.boundary_reason: This same-name variable represents exact RRT modality episode truth, not umbrella active-state truth, family active-state truth, fluid-removal measurement, first-day summary, free-day outcome, AKI stage, or renal SOFA phenotype.

episode_interval_build_translation.episode_label_translation: retain exact source modality labels normalized to CRRT, CVVH, CVVHD, CVVHDF, SCUF, IHD, or Peritoneal
episode_interval_build_translation.episode_start_translation: use merged support_starttime after approved point-carry and procedure intervalization within exact modality
episode_interval_build_translation.episode_end_translation: use merged support_endtime after approved point-carry and procedure intervalization within exact modality
episode_interval_build_translation.continuity_translation: merge overlapping or exactly contiguous intervals only when stay_id and exact modality match; any positive gap or modality-label change starts a new child episode
episode_interval_build_translation.parent_link_translation: link each modality episode to largest positive-overlap std_rrt_active parent and, for opening-family eligible labels, to largest positive-overlap std_crrt_family_active or std_non_crrt_rrt_active parent
episode_interval_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained row means no positive exact-modality episode under this source-label rule; it does not prove absence of umbrella RRT support

validation_contract.no_row_policy_check: absence of row is not universal proof of no RRT; unresolved active dialysis evidence can remain in the umbrella parent without a forced exact child label
notes: The retained source is a reviewed local exact-modality RRT episode foundation built from official MIMIC RRT/CRRT derived tables and dialysis procedure intervals.
Opening v1 does not force unresolved active dialysis evidence into a child modality label.
Exact modality rows bridge back to the any-RRT parent and to family parents when eligible.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint should read this mapping spec and delegate to the current local reviewed implementation until a more fully spec-native runner replaces it.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_rrt_modality_episode outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path rather than side SQL or ad hoc rebuilds.
